## Verification

- [ ] `./scripts/validate.sh`

- [ ] No private URLs, tokens, browsing history, personal configuration, or developer-only paths added

## Product boundaries

- [ ] No telemetry or analytics SDK
- [ ] No real advertising or Token reward integration
- [ ] No automated likes, comments, follows, or feed scrolling
